items.example: I can't understand this grammar rule. What should I do?
You should watch films in English with subtitles.
You shouldn't translate every word you hear.
If I were you, I'd practise speaking with native speakers.
Why don't you try keeping a diary in English?
What about joining an online English course?
You could always listen to podcasts on your way to work.

items.phrase: It might be a good idea to…
items.example: It might be a good idea to review the lesson before the test.
